zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Zimmerman於1437年出生在英國林可爾史爾波 勒 馬希時，她的父親John Zimmerman25歲，母親Margaret Echingham23歲。她於1468年與Alexander Williamson在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾吉爾斯比結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1503年在英國諾薩普頓史爾波索亞特享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Zimmerman于1437年出生在英国林可爾史爾波 勒 馬希时，她的父亲John Zimmerman25岁，母亲Margaret Echingham23岁。她于1468年与Alexander Williamson在英国英格兰林可爾史爾吉爾斯比结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1503年在英国諾薩普頓史爾波索亞特享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Zimmerman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German   Zimmermann  , and a variant of the same Jewish (Ashkenazic) surname.

variants.name: Zimmermann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Hans, Fritz, Gerhard, Hermann, Klaus, Gerd, Manfred, Wolfgang, Bernhard.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a carpenter, Middle High German zimberman (a compound of zimber, zim(m)er ‘timber, wood’ + man ‘man’), German Zimmermann.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Zimmerman was born in 1437, in Burgh le Marsh, Lincolnshire, England, her father, John Zimmerman, was 25 and her mother, Margaret Echingham, was 23. She married Alexander Williamson in 1468, in Girsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1503, in Bozeat, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Zimmerman est née en 1437, à Burgh le Marsh, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, John Zimmerman, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Echingham, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander Williamson en 1468, à Girsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1503, à Bozeat, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Zimmerman 1437 in Burgh le Marsh, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Zimmerman 25 und ihre Mutter Margaret Echingham 23. Sie hat 1468 in Girsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Alexander Williamson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1503 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Bozeat, Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Zimmerman è nata il nel 1437 nel Burgh le Marsh, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, John Zimmerman, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Margaret Echingham, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Alexander Williamson nel 1468, nel Girsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1503, nel Bozeat, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Zimmermanが1437年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアブルグ ル マーッシュで生まれた時，父John Zimmermanは25歳，母Margaret Echinghamは23歳であった。1468年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアギルスビーでAlexander Williamsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1503年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアボズエアトで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Zimmerman(이)가 1437년 영국 링코실르 버그h 일 마시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Zimmerman(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Echingham(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1468년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 지르스비에서 Alexander Williamson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1503년 영국 노르섬프토실르 보즈이트에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Zimmerman nasceu em 1437, em Burgh le Marsh, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Zimmerman, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Echingham, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander Williamson em 1468, em Girsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1503, em Bozeat, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Zimmerman родилась в 1437 г. в местности бург л марш, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Zimmerman было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Echingham, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Williamson в 1468 г. в местности гирсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1503 г. в местности бозит, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Zimmerman nació en 1437, en Burgh le Marsh, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Zimmerman, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret Echingham, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Alexander Williamson en 1468, en Girsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1503, en Bozeat, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años.
